subject: a gladiator hurling a barbed chain — a hard grunt with a metallic chain rattle winding up
prompt: Close-mic'd grunt and guttural exhale, weighty shoulder torque, barbed chain whoosh and interlocking metallic rattle spiraling outward, sharp barbs rasp; hits peak mid-flight with abrasive clanks, then a dusty tail of settling links — a short, brutal burst.
